methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Iran conflict escalation dominates regional threat picture amid cross-border strikes and diplomatic shifts.
bullets: US commandos went deep into Iran to rescue a downed airman while Iranian missiles struck an industrial area in southern Israel and Gulf petrochemical and desalination facilities.
Trump threatened hell for Iran over the Strait of Hormuz while Iran enforced its longest nationwide internet blackout amid warnings of a protracted US-Israel war.
Zelensky met Syria's Sharaa in Damascus following a Turkey visit, and Pashinyan's ruling party stated it pursues a policy to remove the Catholicos.
regional_summary_6h.watch: Monitor potential spillover from Gulf infrastructure strikes and threats to the Bushehr nuclear plant.
